The best option here appears to be **Option A: Synchronized Cardioversion**. Given the ongoing haemodynamic compromise despite less invasive measures failing, synchronized cardioversion offers an effective method to restore sinus rhythm while minimizing the risk associated with unsynchronized defibrillation or high-energy shocks typically required for DC therapy.
